concerns.text: Task T035 'Implement code/analysis/temporal.py with Poisson regression' lacks the concrete deliverable of including the 'Media Event Flag' covariate. The Plan mandates this specific feature to control for reporting artifacts. Without explicitly naming this artifact/feature in the task, an implementer cannot deterministically know to include it, risking a violation of the Plan's revised methodology.

Task T024 'Implement code/analysis/signal_detection.py' fails to specify the 'Bias Adjustment' step using 'Media Event Flag adjusted residuals' required by the Plan. The task description is too vague to ensure the implementer applies the specific covariate adjustment mandated for FR-006 compliance.

Task T030 requires fetching 'non-COVID vaccine doses from CDC reports' but provides a generic URL (https://www.cdc.gov/vaccines/imz-managers/coverage/index.html) rather than the specific dataset file or API endpoint. The implementer cannot deterministically execute this without manually searching for the correct annual report file, violating the 'Single Source of Truth' and 'Reproducibility' principles.

Tasks T036a/b profile memory and T037 tests runtime, but none explicitly define the deliverable of 'logging the peak RAM metric to state/...yaml' to verify SC-004. The success criteria (SC-004) requires measuring against the 7GB limit, but the tasks do not specify the artifact (the log/metric record) that proves this verification occurred.

Task T040 'Security hardening (PII scan, data sanitization)' is too vague. The Constitution (Principle III) mandates a 'Repository-Hygiene Agent's PII scan' as a blocking gate. The task must explicitly name the execution of this specific agent or script and the generation of a pass/fail report artifact, rather than a generic 'hardening' action.

Task T035 implements 'Calendar-Time Anomaly Detection' but does not include a sub-task to verify/document the absence of 'vaccination_date' and 'onset_date' fields in the source data. While the Plan justifies the methodological revision, the tasks lack the concrete step to validate this data limitation assumption before implementation, leaving the waiver unverified in the execution flow.
